title: Сreatorium
description: Creatorium – A Create-based modpack with quests and addons. Full automation, expanded gameplay, and a quest system.
body:
Creatorium – A technical modpack based on Create, featuring quests and addons.

Key Features:
    Full integration of the Create mod with all its mechanisms and automation
    All major Create addons for expanded gameplay
    A quest system with step-by-step tutorials on mechanics
    Balanced progression from simple to complex
    Optimized settings for stable performance

Modpack Features:
    Complete set of Create mechanisms – from gears to complex conveyor systems
    Additional addons: Create Crafts & Additions, Create Deco, and more
    Step-by-step quests teaching all aspects of the mod
    New recipes and materials for deeper gameplay
    Ready-made schematics and automation examples

Who is this modpack for?
    Fans of technical mods and automation
    Those who want to learn Create through a guided quest system
    Players who appreciate balanced progression
    Enthusiasts of industrial and engineering solutions
